tradeIdeas.title: Long Brent Crude / Long ASEAN Energy Producers
tradeIdeas.rationale: Brent $105.33 confirmed Apr 24 (+1.6%, TradingEconomics/CNBC). Islamabad talks fully collapsed Apr 25 - Araghchi departs Pakistan; Trump pulls US envoys; no active back-channel. Trump 'shoot and kill' ROE for IRGC minelaying boats (Apr 23); IRGC calls it 'overt ceasefire breach'. Pentagon told Congress mine-clearing takes ~6 months (PBS) - Hormuz physical reopening delayed even on deal. Tail (50%) tied with Stress (43%). Stop-loss: confirmed deal + mine clearance complete + P&I restoration (Brent sub-$92). Conviction medium.

tradeIdeas.title: Rebuild ASEAN Energy Long / Underweight ASEAN Banks
tradeIdeas.rationale: Brent $105.33 confirmed Apr 24; ASEAN Energy Equities ~153.0 est. (+2.3%); ASEAN Banks ~171.6 est. (-0.8%). iTraxx Asia IG ~210bp (+12bp); ASEAN HY ~600bp (+25bp). Islamabad talks fully collapsed Apr 25 - tail risk 50%. Maintain ASEAN Energy long (stress scenario $95-115 Brent); re-add ASEAN Banks underweight at full size (spreads widening again - 210bp vs pre-crisis 106bp). Tail (50%) points to $130+ Brent and 230-260bp iTraxx. Conviction medium on both legs.

tradeIdeas.title: PHP Short - Hold on Talks Collapse
tradeIdeas.rationale: USD/PHP ~58.90 est. (+0.4% Apr 26). Islamabad talks fully collapsed Apr 25 - tail probability rises to 50%; USD Call/PHP Put 61.00 overlay retains full value. Blockade intact; Iran holds 3 Western vessels; full PHP recovery capped. Stop-loss: confirmed full Hormuz reopening with P&I restoration below 58.00. Conviction low.

tradeIdeas.title: IDR Short - Hold on Re-Escalation
tradeIdeas.rationale: USD/IDR ~17,200 est. (+0.9% Apr 26); Indonesia 10Y ~7.34% est. (+9bp). ICP overshoot ~$35.33/bbl at Brent $105.33 — significant fiscal pressure. Islamabad talks collapse raises tail to 50%; IDR recovery capped. Hold IDR short at half-size; USD Call/IDR Put 17,500 strike retains value. Stop-loss at USD/IDR 16,600 (confirmed Hormuz reopening). Conviction low.

tradeIdeas.title: iTraxx Asia IG CDS Protection - Hold at 210bp
tradeIdeas.rationale: iTraxx Asia IG ~210bp (+12bp Apr 26 est.); ASEAN HY ~600bp (+25bp). Islamabad talks fully collapsed Apr 25 - no diplomatic off-ramp; spreads widening again. Pentagon: mine-clearing ~6 months even post-deal (PBS); full Hormuz commercial reopening delayed regardless of diplomacy. Hold CDS protection at full size; tail (50%) targets iTraxx 230-260bp; stress (43%) stabilises 200-220bp. Remove at confirmed deal + mine clearance complete + spreads below 175bp. Conviction medium.
instruments: Sapura Energy / Hyflux bond short via CDS

tradeIdeas.title: Long JKM LNG vs Short TTF - Hold on Talks Collapse
tradeIdeas.rationale: JKM ~$17.50 est. (+2.9% Apr 26; last confirmed $15.81 TradingEconomics Apr 21); TTF €44.72 confirmed Apr 24. Islamabad talks fully collapsed Apr 25 - LNG supply disruption risk rises; Ras Laffan restart not before late Aug 2026; tail 50%. Pentagon: mine-clearing ~6 months even post-deal - Hormuz physical reopening delayed regardless of diplomacy. Hold JKM long at full size. Stress target $18-22 JKM; tail target $26-30. Stop at confirmed mine clearance + P&I restoration. Conviction medium.
instruments: Asia LNG spot cargo purchase via intermediary

cfTriggers.description: iTraxx Asia IG ~210bp (+12bp Apr 26) - spreads widening as talks collapse (Apr 25) removes diplomatic off-ramp. Execute any residual private placements immediately. Tail (50%) targets 230-260bp. Window is closing - do not wait for further normalisation.

Brent $105.33 confirmed Apr 24 (+1.6%); THB ~34.10 est. (+0.9%); Thailand 10Y ~2.40% (+8bp). Islamabad talks collapse raises tail to 50%; PTTEP upstream EBITDA strong at current oil prices. Execute USD H2 prefunding now - window narrowing as spreads re-widen. Gulf JV sanctions-compliance review urgent given Touska seizure precedent and GL U expiry Apr 19.

iTraxx Asia IG ~210bp (+12bp Apr 26); USD/SGD ~1.2960 (+0.4%); Brent $105.33 confirmed. Talks collapse widens spreads further - working capital input cost pressure resurfaces. Maintain full USD hedging; revolving-credit expansion window narrowing. Tail (50%) targets spreads 230bp+; execute revolving-credit expansion without delay.

ASEAN HY ~600bp (+25bp Apr 26); Brent $105.33 confirmed. Islamabad talks collapse removes diplomatic off-ramp - Hyflux desalination power cost trajectory re-escalates. Advance private-credit and quasi-sovereign restructuring terms before window closes further. Tail (50%) pushes ASEAN HY to 620-650bp.
